hero.title: Smart Food
hero.lead: A real AI-native food platform experience, launched from a local business in Chiang Mai.
hero.support: Chorn Planet applies conversational food discovery, menu guidance, and order-ready workflows to support real food service operations.

visual.alt: Smart Food AI platform visual for a Chiang Mai local business experience

heading.title: From Chiang Mai local business to platform capability

paragraphs: Smart Food AI is designed to provide practical customer-facing and operation-ready value. A restaurant, cafe, or food service team can move from customer chat ordering to menu guidance, payment confirmation, kitchen preparation, delivery coordination, and a service-ready summary.

The Smart Food platform supports multiple payment channels, including cash payment, QR Code payment through banking apps, TrueMoney Wallet payment, and support for government co-payment programs such as Half-Half Plus.

Beyond customer ordering, the platform is structured as an end-to-end food operation system with kitchen workflow, delivery service, order management, payment processing, payment slip verification, accounting, and other internal platform systems that support smart food business operations.

image.alt: Smart Food chat ordering experience preview

cards.title: Local business context
cards.text: Built around real Chiang Mai service needs rather than a generic concept screen.

cards.title: Customer-facing direction
cards.text: Focused on food discovery, preference guidance, and a clear path to service.

cards.title: Production-minded platform
cards.text: Presented as a platform layer that can later connect ordering, analytics, and commerce.

steps.title: AI Chat Ordering
steps.text: Customers can order through AI-assisted chat by selecting a meal, asking questions, or confirming their order in a simple conversation.

image.alt: AI chat ordering interface for Smart Food customers

steps.title: Bill Processing
steps.text: The system confirms the order total, receives the payment slip, and checks the bill before moving the order forward.

image.alt: Smart Food bill processing and payment verification

steps.title: Cooking
steps.text: The kitchen team prepares the confirmed order with fresh ingredients, a clear workflow, and consistent food quality.

image.alt: Kitchen team preparing a confirmed Smart Food order

steps.title: Delivery
steps.text: The rider picks up the completed order and delivers it to the customer according to the service workflow.

image.alt: Smart Food delivery workflow with rider handoff

steps.title: Receiving
steps.text: The customer receives the food through a clear handover process, completing the service journey.

image.alt: Customer receiving a completed Smart Food order

heading.title: Built for a real food service experience

items: Future LINE OA and website ordering direction

heading.title: Why this matters for Chorn Planet
heading.text: The showcase gives collaborators a concrete signal that Chorn Planet builds and delivers AI-native production platforms for real business workflows. Launched from a local food business in Chiang Mai, Chorn Planet serves Smart Food customers with AI technology and creates a practical path for growing business operations.

cards.title: Investor-ready proof
cards.text: A visible platform story that shows Chorn Planet moving from concept into AI-native service delivery for business workflows.

cards.title: Local launch credibility
cards.text: The platform is launched from a real local food business in Chiang Mai and supports practical customer service operations.

cards.title: AI-powered service signal
cards.text: A concrete signal that Chorn Planet serves Smart Food customers through AI technology as an active business platform.

cards.title: Product expansion path
cards.text: A foundation for future SaaS, ordering, commerce, analytics, and Smart Food ecosystem features.

futureDirections: Chorn Planet media and luxury ecosystem integration
